problems.cause: AGREE syntax error due to incorrect annex structure or misplaced keyword
problems.minimal_edit: Move the annex block from system type to system implementation scope

executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from the system type Speed_Control
Add the AGREE annex block to the system implementation Speed_Control.Speed_Control_Impl
Ensure all referenced identifiers (Target, Actuator_Input, Actual) are properly scoped in the new location
